mapper.select: SELECT a.*, ui.ui_nm AS ui_nm, are.area_nm AS area_nm FROM dp_ui_area a LEFT JOIN dp_ui ui ON ui.ui_id = a.ui_id LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = a.area_id WHERE a.ui_area_id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, ui.ui_nm AS ui_nm, are.area_nm AS area_nm FROM dp_ui_area a LEFT JOIN dp_ui ui ON ui.ui_id = a.ui_id LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = a.area_id
ORDER BY a.ui_area_id ASC ORDER BY a.ui_area_id DESC ORDER BY a.reg_date ASC ORDER BY a.reg_date DESC ORDER BY a.reg_date DESC
